globalNews.title: Huge crowds in Mashhad as Iran's late supreme leader is buried
globalNews.summary: Ali Khamenei was buried at the Imam Reza shrine, Iran's holiest Shia Muslim site, ending six days of public mourning ceremonies.

globalNews.title: Ukrainian agent accused of murdering Monaco bomb suspect changes story
globalNews.summary: Two men with links to Ukraine's security services are accused of killing Anastasiia Berezovska and dumping her body in woods.

globalNews.title: East Asia braces for destructive typhoon as landslides kill 15 in Philippines
globalNews.summary: Heading for Taiwan and south-eastern China, the 1,000 km-wide Bavi is forecast to be one of the strongest storms in decades.

globalNews.title: Man nearly sucked out of window mid-air on Ryanair plane, passengers say
globalNews.summary: Ryanair confirm a passenger was given medical treatment after an incident on a Malta Air flight, which is owned by Ryanair.

globalNews.title: China lands reusable rocket for first time, state media says
globalNews.summary: It follows similar landings of reusable rockets by US-owned companies SpaceX and Blue Origin.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin whales sent BTC price to $64K as Coinbase Premium broke key level: CryptoQuant
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin price gains came thanks to US whales propeling the Coinbase Premium above a key trend line, new analysis from CryptoQuant reported.

cryptoNews.title: A16z’s Andreessen lands Federal Reserve role as AI reshapes policy debate
cryptoNews.summary: The Fed named a16z co-founder Marc Andreessen to co-lead an AI productivity and jobs task force under Chair Kevin Warsh’s policy review.

cryptoNews.title: MiCA licensing only the beginning as crypto custodians face scrutiny
cryptoNews.summary: A MiCA license allows crypto firms to operate in the EU, but the ESMA’s review will test whether custodians can meet the required security and resilience standards.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: Will the crypto lobby's $189M campaign get CLARITY over the line?
cryptoNews.summary: As the CLARITY Act advances, crypto's growing political influence in Washington is under scrutiny. But the crypto lobby's massive campaign spend is only part of the story.

aiNews.title: OpenAI says GPT 5.6 is the ‘preferred model’ for Microsoft Copilot 365 amid breakup chatter
aiNews.summary: OpenAI's new family of models will continue to power Microsoft's suite of workplace and productivity apps.

aiNews.title: Fidji Simo steps down from OpenAI’s No. 2 role
aiNews.summary: OpenAI's No. 2 executive, Fidji Simo, is stepping down from her full-time role after her medical leave proved longer than expected — a leadership vacuum that comes at a tricky time as the company eyes

aiNews.title: OpenAI launches its new family of models with GPT-5.6
aiNews.summary: OpenAI's latest family of models promises improvements across a range of areas, including cybersecurity.

aiNews.title: An AI agent startup just let its agent run its $100M fundraise
aiNews.summary: Lyzr, a startup that builds AI agents for enterprises, used its own AI agent to raise a $100 million round — proof, evidently, that the product actually works.

aiNews.title: OpenAI is shutting down Atlas, but its AI browser ambitions are still growing
aiNews.summary: OpenAI is sunsetting its AI-powered browser after less than a year. But it's moving some agentic browsing features to its desktop app and a Chrome extension.
